title: A solid regular pentagon — a complete, exactly-bounded polygon where each side is a governing rule.
conceptualBridge: The pentagon means Precept's contract is a structurally closed form because each side is a governing rule and the enclosed space is the exact, total valid domain.
decision: Hard fail on conceptual bridge (score 2.5 < 3): no specific reason the form means Precept over any other bounded-domain tool — the polygon shape is too generic to carry the necessary meaning.
